news.title: Stocks, Bonds Selloff Deepens as Iran War Continues
news.description: A selloff in stocks, gold and bonds deepened as the US and Iran hardened their rhetoric and signaled a potential escalation to their conflict in the Middle East. Bloomberg's Mark Cudmore breaks down the situation.

news.title: Two Indian LPG Carriers Are in Transit Through Strait of Hormuz
news.description: Two Indian-flagged vessels carrying liquefied petroleum gas are making their way through the Strait of Hormuz, taking a route that hews closely to the Iranian coastline, ship-tracking data show.

news.title: Saudi Arabia intercepts three drones over its eastern region
news.description: Saudi Arabia’s defence ministry says its forces have intercepted and destroyed three drones in the eastern region of the country in the past two hours. We have reported earlier that Saudi air defences also intercepted one missile targeting Riyadh.

news.title: Soussa: GCC Economies Resilient with Deep Pockets
news.description:
The Iran war has raised the risk of a sharp slowdown across Gulf economies, especially if disruption to the Strait of Hormuz continues.

news.title: US hit Iranian engine production facility in Qom, Centcom says
